---
title: "ml-robustness-heatmaps"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(ragg)
library(sysfonts)
library(showtext)
```

```{r}
repo_root <- "/Users/carmen/Documents/github/de-bias/bias-detection"
out_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/si-figures-r1-ml-robustness")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

top_n_per_model <- 20
include_lagged_features_in_heatmap <- FALSE

roboto_regular <- "/Users/carmen/Library/Fonts/RobotoCondensed-VariableFont_wght.ttf"
roboto_italic <- "/Users/carmen/Library/Fonts/RobotoCondensed-Italic-VariableFont_wght.ttf"

plot_family <- if (file.exists(roboto_regular)) {
  sysfonts::font_add("Roboto Condensed", regular = roboto_regular, italic = roboto_italic)
  showtext::showtext_auto()
  "Roboto Condensed"
} else {
  "sans"
}
```

```{r}
source("../code/style/data-visualisation_theme.R")
```

# Inputs

```{r}
dataset_paths <- tibble::tribble(
  ~dataset_label, ~dataset_key, ~explain_bias_dir,
  "Twitter/X", "twitter", file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/twitter/explain-bias"),
  "Meta", "fb_tts", file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/fb_tts/explain-bias"),
  "Multi-app1", "mapp1", file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/mapp1/explain-bias"),
  "Multi-app2", "mapp2", file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/mapp2/explain-bias")
)

model_specs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~spec_key, ~spec_label, ~file_name,
  "holdout_nolag", "Holdout", "feature-importance-data_lad_holdout_nolagcov.csv",
  "holdout_lag", "Holdout\n(lagged cov.)", "feature-importance-data_lad_holdout_lagcov.csv",
  "spatialcv_nolag", "Spatial CV", "feature-importance-data_lad_spatialcv_nolagcov.csv",
  "spatialcv_lag", "Spatial CV\n(lagged cov.)", "feature-importance-data_lad_spatialcv_lagcov.csv"
)
```

```{r}
load_dictionary <- function() {
  dict_path <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/dictionary_with_lags.csv"
  
  if (!file.exists(dict_path)) {
    stop("Dictionary file not found: ", dict_path)
  }
  
  dict_df <- readr::read_csv(dict_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  if ("var_label2" %in% names(dict_df)) {
    bind_rows(
      if ("var_label5" %in% names(dict_df)) {
        dict_df %>%
          transmute(feature = var_label5, feature_label = var_label2, priority = 1L)
      } else {
        tibble::tibble(feature = character(), feature_label = character(), priority = integer())
      },
      if ("var_label0" %in% names(dict_df)) {
        dict_df %>%
          transmute(feature = var_label0, feature_label = var_label2, priority = 2L)
      } else {
        tibble::tibble(feature = character(), feature_label = character(), priority = integer())
      }
    ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(feature), feature != "", !is.na(feature_label), feature_label != "") %>%
      arrange(priority) %>%
      distinct(feature, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      select(feature, feature_label)
  } else {
    tibble::tibble(feature = character(), feature_label = character())
  }
}

dict_df <- load_dictionary()
```

# Helpers

```{r}
read_importance_file <- function(base_dir, file_name, spec_label) {
  path_file <- file.path(base_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path_file)) {
    return(tibble())
  }
  
  readr::read_csv(path_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    rename(feature = 1, value = 2) %>%
    mutate(
      specification = spec_label,
      value_std = value / sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
}

prepare_heatmap_data <- function(base_dir, dict_df, include_lagged_features_in_heatmap, top_n_per_model) {
  importance_long <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(model_specs)), function(i) {
    read_importance_file(base_dir, model_specs$file_name[i], model_specs$spec_label[i])
  }))
  
  if (nrow(importance_long) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }
  
  if (!isTRUE(include_lagged_features_in_heatmap)) {
    importance_long <- importance_long %>%
      filter(!grepl("_lagq$", feature), feature != "bias_w")
  }
  
  top_features <- importance_long %>%
    group_by(specification) %>%
    arrange(desc(value_std), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n_per_model) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct(feature) %>%
    pull(feature)
  
  heatmap_df <- importance_long %>%
    filter(feature %in% top_features) %>%
    left_join(dict_df, by = "feature") %>%
    mutate(
      feature_label = dplyr::coalesce(feature_label, feature)
    )
  
  feature_order <- heatmap_df %>%
    group_by(feature_label) %>%
    summarise(mean_importance = mean(value_std, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_importance)) %>%
    pull(feature_label)
  
  heatmap_df %>%
    mutate(
      specification = factor(specification, levels = model_specs$spec_label),
      feature_label = factor(feature_label, levels = feature_order)
    )
}

plot_heatmap <- function(heatmap_df, dataset_label) {
  ggplot(heatmap_df, aes(x = feature_label, y = specification, fill = value_std)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "D",
      begin = 0.05,
      end = 0.95,
      labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01),
      name = "Standardised\nimportance"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = dataset_label,
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_plot_tufte() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = plot_family, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 93, face = "bold", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0, lineheight = 0.3, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 90, face = "bold", hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, lineheight = 0.24, margin = margin(r = 8), colour = "black"),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x.top = element_text(size = 93, face = "bold", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0, lineheight = 0.3, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.x.bottom = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 94, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 88, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.35, colour = "black"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 86, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      legend.key.width = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.key.height = unit(2.6, "cm"),
      legend.box.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", direction = "vertical", barheight = unit(8, "cm")))
}
```

# Build and save heatmaps

```{r}
heatmap_paths <- vector("list", nrow(dataset_paths))
names(heatmap_paths) <- dataset_paths$dataset_label

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dataset_paths))) {
  dataset_label <- dataset_paths$dataset_label[i]
  dataset_key <- dataset_paths$dataset_key[i]
  base_dir <- dataset_paths$explain_bias_dir[i]
  
  heatmap_df <- prepare_heatmap_data(
    base_dir = base_dir,
    dict_df = dict_df,
    include_lagged_features_in_heatmap = include_lagged_features_in_heatmap,
    top_n_per_model = top_n_per_model
  )
  
  if (nrow(heatmap_df) == 0) {
    next
  }

  p <- plot_heatmap(heatmap_df, dataset_label)
  print(p)

  out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_ml_robustness_", dataset_key, ".png"))
  ggsave(
    out_file,
    p,
    width = 18,
    height = 10,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white",
    device = ragg::agg_png
  )
  heatmap_paths[[dataset_label]] <- out_file
}

heatmap_paths
```

# Output directory

```{r}
out_dir
list.files(out_dir)
```
